items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Wins Analyst Upgrades As Lithium Expansion Story Gains Support
items.snippet: Albemarle received analyst upgrades from Citi and RBC highlighting expansion and productivity improvements. ALB stock at $133.7 after -16.6% past week and -24.7% past month, but up 108.6% past year.

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
Albemarle vs. Rio Tinto: Which Lithium Stock Holds More Promise?
Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC raised PT to $257, expects EBITDA of $2.8B (2026) and $2.9B (2027). Lithium supply tight through 2027.
